lastReleaseMessage: Admin-configurable shift options and a full visual polish...

barRaise.topFinding: Eleventh consecutive report, and this cycle the tree finally moved, but the wrong way. A self-locating-cwd block was added to scripts/release.ps1 and scripts/discord-notify.ps1 (matching the CLAUDE.md cross-project standard), but the editing pass mangled the encoding: both files now carry a stray UTF-8 BOM and discord-notify.ps1's em-dash voice-rule regex was corrupted into mojibake, so the next release would post raw em-dashes to the public Discord channel. The leaked Discord webhook in scripts/.discord_webhook.txt is still tracked and un-gitignored for the eleventh straight report. The dirty tree has grown to seven modified files plus two .bak files and eleven untracked BAR_RAISE reports, last commit is still b41b853 (2026-05-29, eight days back), and the whole pile still collapses into one v0.3.1 commit nobody has run.
